title: Celestora
description: Celestora is a mod that includes RPG, Farming, Ores and materials, Food and much more. The mod is under development but already has a lot of interesting content!
body:
![Celestora text update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57ad0c67b07010b28a5db7f1fecc172076f213b7.png)

**Celestora** is a mod that includes RPG, Farming, Ores and materials, Food and much more. The mod is under development but already has a lot of interesting content!

# Content list:
- ### Ruby and Ruby Tools
- ### Polished diamond
- ### Emberite and Emberite Dust _(new fuel)_
- ### Chiken Leg
- ### Shashliks _(Kebabs)_ from all types of meat
- ### Enderite and Enderite Tools
- ### Cherry _(fruit from the cherry tree)_
- ### Hop and Beer
- ### Staffs
- ### Decorative blocks
- ### Runes

_**WARNING:**_ _WIP content may still cause errors, so there is no crafting_



### Plans for future updates:
- New decorative blocks
- New biomes
- New materials and ores
- New mobs
- New staffs
